hooks.command: filepath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -q '\.go$'; then golangci-lint run --new-from-rev=HEAD --timeout=30s ./... 2>&1 | head -30; fi

filepath=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$filepath" ] && echo "$filepath" | grep -q '\.go$'; then dir=$(dirname "$filepath"); pkg="./${dir#$PWD/}"; go test "$pkg/..." -count=1 -timeout=30s 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
